Notes: The Lions win ninth straight as Adrienne Warner records first double-double of
season with 12 points and 11 caroms, while Laura Mala added 10.  Kean's
Jaquana Abdullah became the all-time scoring leader on 11 points today for
Game.Officials: Robert Polniak,  Robert Solomon,  James Spingler
